Surname.jp: 喧嘩嫌いな【閃撃の会】会長

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52497_0]</color> chance to increase a random ally's <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52497_0] turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52497_0]</color>の確率でランダムの味方単体の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52497_0]ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52497_0]</color> 확률로 무작위 아군 한 명의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52497_0]턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52497_0]</color>的几率使随机1名友军的<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52497_0]回合</color>。

name.jp: 徐かなること林の如く

description.en: (Passive Effect) Has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52498_0]</color> chance to reduce the skill cooldown of <color=#28d9ed>Like a Noble Mountain</color> by <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52498_0] turn(s)</color> upon taking a critical hit.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)会心ダメージを受けた場合、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52498_0]</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>【動かざること山の如く】</color>のスキルターンを<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52498_0]ターン</color>減少させる。
description.kr: (패시브 효과) 치명 피격 시 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52498_0]</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>고고한 산처럼</color>의 스킬 쿨타임이 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52498_0]턴</color> 감소합니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)受到暴击时,有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52498_0]</color>的几率使<color=#28d9ed>傲若孤山</color>的技能冷却时间减少<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52498_0]回合</color>。

name.jp: 動かざること山の如く

description.en: <color=#28d9ed>Heals</color> all allies for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52499_0]</color> of Flamberge's Max Health.
description.jp: 味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>を【フランベルジュ】の最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52499_0]</color>回復させる。
description.kr: 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>을 플랑베르쥬 최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52499_0]</color>만큼 회복시킵니다.
description.zh: 使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>恢复相当于弗朗贝尔修生命值上限的<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52499_0]</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nWhen hit by a Critical, decreases the <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> of a random enemy by 50% for 1 turn. (Cannot be dispelled)
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n会心を受けた時、1ターンの間、ランダムな敵1体の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を50%減少。(解除不可)
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n치명 피격 시 1턴 동안 무작위 적 1명의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 50% 감소시킵니다.(해제 불가)
description.zh: (被动效果)\n受到致命打击时,使随机1名敌人的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低50%,持续1回合。(不可解除)

description.en:
<color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> is always increased by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
At end of turn, restores your HP by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color>.

At end of turn, reduces the enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color>.
description.jp:
常時、<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>上昇する。
ターン終了時、自分のHPを<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>回復する。

ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>減少させる。
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

턴 시작 시 자신의 체력을 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color>회복합니다.
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.zh:
<color=#28d9ed>穿透</color>始终+<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>+<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。
回合结束时,回复自身生命值<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>。

回合结束时,降低敌方队伍CP<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
